tasks.title: Lock denominator/cohort policy and benchmark metric definitions
tasks.description: Publish Tier 1 vs Tier 2 denominator and metric definitions in PLAN-linked notes.
acceptance_criteria: Tier 1 and Tier 2 denominator definitions are explicit and unambiguous.
Metric definitions are documented in PLAN-linked notes.
Changes are reflected in repository docs with reproducible references.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Lock denominator/cohort policy and publish metric definitions for Tier 1 vs Tier 2 benchmarks.

tasks.title: Implement ST0.3b split suite
tasks.description: Add explicit phage-family holdout and host+phage dual-axis stress tests.
acceptance_criteria: Split suite includes phage-family holdout and dual-axis host+phage stress tests.
Leakage checks are updated for the new split modes.
Output artifacts document split membership and protocol details.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Implement ST0.3b split suite with explicit phage-family holdout and host+phage dual-axis stress tests.

tasks.title: Implement ST0.4b ablation suite
tasks.description: Add host-only, phage-only, and no-identity controls to quantify signal sources.
acceptance_criteria: Ablation matrix reports host-only, phage-only, and no-identity controls.
Ablation outputs are reproducible under locked split protocol.
Result summary explains dominant signal sources and failure modes.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Implement ST0.4b ablations (host-only, phage-only, no-identity controls) to quantify true signal sources.

tasks.title: Implement ST0.5b/ST0.6c dual-slice reporting with bootstrap CIs
tasks.description: Report metrics on full-label and strict-confidence slices with uncertainty intervals.
acceptance_criteria: Dual-slice metrics are reported for all benchmark outputs.
Bootstrap confidence intervals are included for strain-level top-k metrics.
Report artifacts remain reproducible from one command.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Implement ST0.5b/ST0.6c reporting on both slices (full-label and strict-confidence) with bootstrap CIs.

tasks.title: Implement first mechanistic host/phage signal block
tasks.description: Build receptor/defense host proxies plus phage RBP/depolymerase/domain proxy features.
acceptance_criteria: Host receptor and defense proxy features are versioned with provenance metadata.
Phage RBP/depolymerase/domain proxy features are generated reproducibly.
Feature manifests describe schema, missingness, and confidence fields.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Implement first mechanistic signal block from internal data: host receptor/defense proxies + phage RBP/depolymerase/domain proxies.

tasks.title: Run first PHIStruct-style RBP embedding pilot
tasks.description: Compare structural RBP embeddings versus non-structural features on phage-family holdout.
acceptance_criteria: Pilot trains and evaluates on phage-family holdout split.
Comparison includes structural and non-structural RBP feature variants.
Results include calibration and recommendation utility deltas.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Run first PHIStruct-style RBP embedding pilot on phage-family holdout split and compare to non-structural RBP features.

tasks.title: Create source_registry.csv with Tier A/B candidates
tasks.description: Register VHRdb, BASEL, KlebPhaCol, GPB, Virus-Host DB, and NCBI metadata sources.
acceptance_criteria: Registry includes source type, label type, resolution, assay type, license, and access path.
Each source has a last-checked timestamp and confidence tier metadata.
Registry is committed under lyzortx-owned path and referenced from notes.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Create source_registry.csv and populate initial entries for VHRdb, BASEL, KlebPhaCol, GPB, Virus-Host DB, NCBI.

tasks.title: Implement first Tier A ingest path and ablation
tasks.description: Implement VHRdb ingest and run internal-only vs +VHRdb ablation.
acceptance_criteria: VHRdb ingest preserves source-fidelity fields and uncertainty metadata.
Ablation compares internal-only baseline versus +VHRdb integration.
Lift/failure analysis is reported by datasource and confidence tier.
tasks.plan_checkbox_text: Implement first Tier A ingest path (VHRdb) and run internal-only vs +VHRdb ablation.
